test_deploy_initAccount_viaDelgatecall().details: When initAccount is called via delegatecall, address(this) in the package code      is the PROXY address, not the package address. This proves delegatecall context.

testFuzz_calcAddress_alwaysMatchesDeploy.notice: Fuzz test: calcAddress always matches deployed address

testFuzz_deploy_neverRevertsForValidArgs.notice: Fuzz test: deployment never reverts for valid args

test_calcAddress_matchesDeployedAddress(.notice: Test that calcAddress matches actual deployed address

test_deploy_baseFacetsInstalled().notice: Test that base facets are installed in deployed proxy

test_deploy_deterministicAddress_samePac.notice: Test that factory deployment produces deterministic addresses

test_deploy_diamondLoupe_routesCorrectly.notice: Test that DiamondLoupe functions route correctly

test_deploy_differentArgs_differentAddre.notice: Test that different args produce different addresses

test_deploy_differentPackages_differentA.notice: Test that different packages with same args produce different addresses

test_deploy_emitsDiamondCutEvents().notice: Test that DiamondCut events are emitted during deployment

test_deploy_erc165_supportsInterface().notice: Test that ERC165 supportsInterface works on deployed proxy

test_deploy_greeterPackage_initializesSt.notice: Test that greeter package initializes storage via initAccount

test_deploy_idempotent_secondDeploymentR.notice: Test that second deployment is idempotent (no-op)

test_deploy_initAccount_viaDelgatecall().notice: Test that initAccount is called via delegatecall (storage is in proxy)

test_deploy_packageFacetSelectors_routeC.notice: Test that package facet selectors route correctly

test_deploy_packageFacetsInstalled().notice: Test that package-specific facets are installed correctly

test_deploy_packageFunctions_callable().notice: Test that calling package functions actually works

test_deploy_postDeployFacet_removedFromF.notice: Test that PostDeployHookFacet is removed from facet address set

test_deploy_postDeploySelector_notRoutab.notice: Test that postDeploy selector is NOT routable after deployment

test_deploy_postDeploy_reverts().notice: Test that calling postDeploy on proxy reverts

test_deploy_storageIsolation_betweenProx.notice: Test that storage is isolated to each proxy

test_factoryFacetCuts_returnsBaseFacets(.notice: Test factory's facetCuts returns correct base facet cuts

test_factoryFacetInterfaces_returnsCorre.notice: Test factory's facetInterfaces returns correct interfaces

test_pkgConfig_returnsPkgAndArgs().notice: Test pkgConfig returns correct package and args

test_postDeployFacetCuts_returnsRemovalC.notice: Test that postDeployFacetCuts returns correct removal cut
